client_id.description: The client ID of the application.

client_secret.description: The client secret of the application. May be omitted by public clients that authenticate through other means, such as a PKCE `code_verifier`.

code.description: The authorization code received from the redirect.

code_verifier.description: The PKCE code verifier used to derive the code challenge passed to the authorization URL.

invitation_token.description: An invitation token to accept during authentication.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the user's request.

device_id.description: A unique identifier for the device.

user_agent.description: The user agent string from the user's browser.
